plugin_desc: Ekinops WDM, CWDM and DWDM transmission SNMP child template for devices under Ekinops PEN 20044. This child template relies on the shared Transmission SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Stable private CPU, memory, temperature, fan and power health scalars are not proven in the current MIB facts, so they are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: Transmission
